$comment: Machine-readable description of the verdict/v2 frontmatter for tooling. Documentation only; not a jsonschema-validator dependency. Normative prose lives in VERDICT_SCHEMA.md.
status_order: ascending total order as listed; overall status = MIN over claims[].status (validator recomputes)
open_semantics: OPEN exists only at index level and means no VERDICT.md file exists for the question; OPEN never appears inside a VERDICT.md
strict_note: unknown frontmatter keys are validation errors (E_SCHEMA)

slug.note: zero-padded 2-digit; must match the directory name containing the VERDICT.md

packet_sha256.constraint: must be non-null when verification is blind; q<NN>_<slug>/_packets/ must contain a packet file whose sha256 matches (else E_BLIND)

predecessor.constraint: if non-null, repo-relative path that must exist on disk; points at the v2_2 question dir (else E_PREDECESSOR)

registry_ids.constraint: every ID must exist as a row in VARIABLES.md (else E_REGISTRY); empty list allowed only for desk-review verdicts

prediction_ids.constraint: every ref must exist in PREDICTIONS.md; must be non-empty when verification is blind (else E_PREDICTION)

falsifier.constraint: non-empty; states what observation falsifies this claim (else E_FALSIFIER)

key_results.constraint: each string must appear verbatim in the body Results section (else E_KEYNUM)

evidence.constraint: subset of evidence_manifest paths; non-empty if claim status is PARTIALLY_VERIFIED or VERIFIED (else E_FLOOR)

path.constraint: relative path inside the question dir; must exist on disk; absolute paths or escapes are E_MANIFEST_MISSING

sha256.constraint: must match the file's actual sha256 (else E_HASH)

floor_rules: if evidence_manifest is empty, every claim status must be <= UNSUPPORTED
any claim with status VERIFIED or PARTIALLY_VERIFIED must list at least 1 evidence path

body_sections.status_line: the ## Status section contains exactly one line of the form '**Status:** <STATUS>' equal to the frontmatter status; no other body line may begin with '**Status:**'
body_sections.results_requirements: verbatim command lines, verbatim output excerpts, and exit codes for every run claimed

error_codes.E_SCHEMA: missing/unknown field, bad enum, bad date, slug-dir mismatch
error_codes.E_BODY_MISMATCH: body Status line absent, duplicated, or != frontmatter
error_codes.E_MANIFEST_MISSING: manifest path absent on disk, absolute, or escapes the question dir
error_codes.E_HASH: sha256 mismatch on any manifest file
error_codes.E_PREDICTION: prediction_id not found in PREDICTIONS.md, or blind verdict with empty prediction_ids
error_codes.E_KEYNUM: a key_results string not found verbatim in body Results section
error_codes.E_PREDECESSOR: predecessor non-null and path does not exist
error_codes.E_CATALOG: question dir slug not present in _meta/questions.yaml, or duplicate question id
error_codes.E_BLIND: verification blind without valid packet (null hash, missing packet file, or hash mismatch)
